headline: CBMJ CEO Rips Legacy Liberal Media Over Iran Coverage on The Schaftlein Report
summary: Negative Iran coverage from legacy media giants Disney (DIS), Comcast (CMCSA), Warner Bros. Discovery (WBD), and Paramount Global (PSKY) may be driving viewers toward independent outlets like Patriot.TV ATLANTA, GA / ACCESS Newswire / March 19, 2026 ...

headline: Ultra-Fast, Reliable Internet from Xfinity Now Available in Miami-Dade’s Coastal Communities
summary: MIAMI BEACH, Fla., March 19, 2026--Comcast is connecting more than 3,700 new homes and businesses in Miami-Dade County’s coastal communities to multi-gigabit, symmetrical Internet from America’s smartest and most reliable converged network. The network expansion projects span the City of Miami Beach, North Bay Village, and the towns of Bay Harbor Islands and Surfside. By expanding its next-generation fiber network, the investment will strengthen connectivity across some of Florida’s most dynamic

headline: Comcast Stock Edges Up In Pre-Market—Here's What You Should Know
summary: Comcast Corp. stock edged up 0.49% in pre-market trading on Thursday after closing the regular session down 5.02%.
